name: manage-screenshots
title: Manage Screenshots
description: Search and view your screenshots on your Windows PC

preferences.name: screenshotsDirectory
preferences.title: Screenshots Directory
preferences.description: The folder where your screenshots are stored

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: praise_ogunleye
